approach: Unsupervised / self-supervised composite. No labeled variant training corpus used; therefore no train/test label leakage is possible.

resources.name: Zoonomia 241-mammal phyloP (hg38)
resources.note: Multiple-sequence-alignment conservation; independent of human phenotype/clinical labels

resources.name: Ensembl VEP REST
resources.use: variant consequence class, amino-acid change, protein position, SIFT (alignment-based) score. GRCh38.
resources.note: SIFT is alignment/conservation-based. PolyPhen and other disease-label-trained predictors were NOT requested/used.

resources.name: Ensembl sequence REST
resources.use: fetch Ensembl transcript protein sequences for missense variants (input to ESM2)

resources.name: ESM2 (facebook/esm2_t33_650M_UR50D)
resources.use: self-supervised protein language model; masked-marginal log-likelihood ratio for missense variants
resources.note: Pretrained on UniRef50 protein sequences; no variant-effect labels
